_**User (2026-03-17 16:57:35Z)**_

You are an expert code simplification specialist focused on enhancing code clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving exact functionality. Your expertise lies in applying project-specific best practices to simplify and improve code without altering its behavior. You prioritize readable, explicit code over overly compact solutions. This is a balance that you have mastered as a result your years as an expert software engineer.

You will analyze recently modified code and apply refinements that:

Preserve Functionality: Never change what the code does - only how it does it. All original features, outputs, and behaviors must remain intact.

Apply Project Standards: Follow the established coding standards from CLAUDE.md including:

Use ES modules with proper import sorting and extensions
Prefer function keyword over arrow functions
Use explicit return type annotations for top-level functions
Follow proper React component patterns with explicit Props types
Use proper error handling patterns (avoid try/catch when possible)
Maintain consistent naming conventions
Enhance Clarity: Simplify code structure by:

Reducing unnecessary complexity and nesting
Eliminating redundant code and abstractions
Improving readability through clear variable and function names
Consolidating related logic
Removing unnecessary comments that describe obvious code
IMPORTANT: Avoid nested ternary operators - prefer switch statements or if/else chains for multiple conditions
Choose clarity over brevity - explicit code is often better than overly compact code
Maintain Balance: Avoid over-simplification that could:

Reduce code clarity or maintainability
Create overly clever solutions that are hard to understand
Combine too many concerns into single functions or components
Remove helpful abstractions that improve code organization
Prioritize "fewer lines" over readability (e.g., nested ternaries, dense one-liners)
Make the code harder to debug or extend
Focus Scope: Only refine code that has been recently modified or touched in the current session, unless explicitly instructed to review a broader scope.

Your refinement process:

Identify the recently modified code sections
Analyze for opportunities to improve elegance and consistency
Apply project-specific best practices and coding standards
Ensure all functionality remains unchanged
Verify the refined code is simpler and more maintainable
Document only significant changes that affect understanding
You operate autonomously and proactively, refining code immediately after it's written or modified without requiring explicit requests. Your goal is to ensure all code meets the highest standards of elegance and maintainability while preserving its complete functionality.

```text
     1→import { clsx } from 'clsx'
     2→import type { Metadata } from 'next'
     3→import type { Article, WithContext } from 'schema-dts'
     4→
     5→import { AckRead } from '~/components/common/AckRead'
     6→import { ClientOnly } from '~/components/common/ClientOnly'
     7→import { PageColorGradient } from '~/components/common/PageColorGradient'
     8→import {
     9→  buildRoomName,
    10→  Presence,
    11→  RoomProvider,
    12→} from '~/components/modules/activity'
    13→import { CommentAreaRootLazy } from '~/components/modules/comment'
    14→import {
    15→  PostActionAside,
    16→  PostBottomBarAction,
    17→  PostCopyright,
    18→} from '~/components/modules/post'
    19→import { GoToAdminEditingButton } from '~/components/modules/shared/GoToAdminEditingButton'
    20→import { ReadIndicatorForMobile } from '~/components/modules/shared/ReadIndicator'
    21→import { TocFAB } from '~/components/modules/toc/TocFAB'
    22→import { TocHeadingStrategyProvider } from '~/components/modules/toc/TocHeadingStrategy'
    23→import {
    24→  BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView,
    25→  BottomToUpTransitionView,
    26→} from '~/components/ui/transition'
    27→import { OnlyMobile } from '~/components/ui/viewport/OnlyMobile'
    28→import { getOgUrl } from '~/lib/helper.server'
    29→import { getSummaryFromMd } from '~/lib/markdown'
    30→import { definePrerenderPage } from '~/lib/request.server'
    31→import {
    32→  buildLanguageAlternates,
    33→  buildLocalePrefixedPath,
    34→  getSupportedLocalesFromTranslations,
    35→} from '~/lib/seo/hreflang'
    36→import { CurrentPostDataProvider } from '~/providers/post/CurrentPostDataProvider'
    37→import {
    38→  LayoutRightSidePortal,
    39→  LayoutRightSideProvider,
    40→} from '~/providers/shared/LayoutRightSideProvider'
    41→import { WrappedElementProvider } from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'
    42→
    43→import type { PageParams, PostDataResult, PostWithTranslation } from './api'
    44→import { getData } from './api'
    45→import {
    46→  FocusReadingEffect,
    47→  LdJsonWithAuthor,
    48→  MarkdownSelection,
    49→  PostDataReValidate,
    50→  PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider,
    51→  PostMetaBarInternal,
    52→  PostNoticeCard,
    53→  PostTitle,
    54→  SlugReplacer,
    55→} from './pageExtra'
    56→import { PostContent } from './PostContent'
    57→
    58→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
    59→
    60→export const generateMetadata = async (props: {
    61→  params: Promise<PageParams>
    62→  searchParams: Promise<{ lang?: string }>
    63→}): Promise<Metadata> => {
    64→  const params = await props.params
    65→  const searchParams = await props.searchParams
    66→  try {
    67→    const { post: data } = await getData({
    68→      ...params,
    69→      lang: searchParams.lang,
    70→    })
    71→    const {
    72→      category: { slug: categorySlug },
    73→      meta,
    74→    } = data
    75→    const description = getSummaryFromMd(data.text ?? '')
    76→
    77→    const ogImage = await getOgUrl(
    78→      'post',
    79→      {
    80→        category: categorySlug,
    81→        slug: data.slug,
    82→      },
    83→      params.locale,
    84→    )
    85→
    86→    const canonicalPathNoLocale = `/posts/${categorySlug}/${data.slug}`
    87→    const canonicalPath = buildLocalePrefixedPath(
    88→      params.locale as any,
    89→      canonicalPathNoLocale,
    90→    )
    91→    const supportedLocales = getSupportedLocalesFromTranslations({
    92→      sourceLang: data.translationMeta?.sourceLang,
    93→      availableTranslations: (data as any).availableTranslations,
    94→    })
    95→
    96→    return {
    97→      title: data.title,
    98→      description,
    99→      openGraph: {
   100→        title: data.title,
   101→        description,
   102→        images: ogImage,
   103→        type: 'article',
   104→      },
   105→      twitter: {
   106→        images: ogImage,
   107→        title: data.title,
   108→        description,
   109→        card: 'summary_large_image',
   110→      },
   111→      keywords: meta?.keywords,
   112→      category: categorySlug,
   113→      alternates: {
   114→        canonical: canonicalPath,
   115→        languages: {
   116→          ...buildLanguageAlternates(canonicalPathNoLocale, supportedLocales),
   117→          'x-default': canonicalPathNoLocale,
   118→        },
   119→      },
   120→    } satisfies Metadata
   121→  } catch {
   122→    return {}
   123→  }
   124→}
   125→
   126→const PostPage = ({ data }: { data: PostWithTranslation }) => {
   127→  const { id } = data
   128→  return (
   129→    <div className="relative w-full min-w-0">
   130→      <AckRead id={id} type="post" />
   131→      <div>
   132→        <div className="mb-8">
   133→          <PostTitle />
   134→          <GoToAdminEditingButton
   135→            className="absolute -top-6 right-0"
   136→            id={id!}
   137→            type="posts"
   138→          />
   139→
   140→          <PostMetaBarInternal className="mb-8 justify-center" />
   141→
   142→          <PostNoticeCard />
   143→        </div>
   144→        <WrappedElementProvider eoaDetect>
   145→          <ReadIndicatorForMobile />
   146→          <Presence />
   147→          <PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   148→            <MarkdownSelection>
   149→              <article
   150→                className={clsx(data.contentFormat !== 'lexical' && 'prose')}
   151→              >
   152→                <div className="sr-only">
   153→                  <PostTitle />
   154→                </div>
   155→                <FocusReadingEffect />
   156→                <PostContent contentFormat={data.contentFormat} />
   157→              </article>
   158→            </MarkdownSelection>
   159→          </PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   160→
   161→          <LayoutRightSidePortal>
   162→            <PostActionAside />
   163→          </LayoutRightSidePortal>
   164→        </WrappedElementProvider>
   165→      </div>
   166→      <ClientOnly>
   167→        <PostCopyright />
   168→
   169→        {/* <SubscribeBell defaultType="post_c" /> */}
   170→        <PostBottomBarAction />
   171→      </ClientOnly>
   172→    </div>
   173→  )
   174→}
   175→
   176→export default definePrerenderPage<PageParams>()<PostDataResult>({
   177→  fetcher(params) {
   178→    return getData(params)
   179→  },
   180→
   181→  Component: async (props) => {
   182→    const { data: fetchedData, params, fetchedAt } = props
   183→    const { post: data } = fetchedData
   184→
   185→    const fullPath = `/posts/${data.category.slug}/${data.slug}`
   186→    const currentPath = `/posts/${params.category}/${params.slug}`
   187→
   188→    const jsonLd: WithContext<Article> = {
   189→      '@context': 'https://schema.org',
   190→      '@type': 'BlogPosting',
   191→      headline: data.title,
   192→      image: data.meta?.cover ? [data.meta.cover] : undefined,
   193→      description: data.summary || (data.text ?? '').slice(0, 200),
   194→      datePublished: data.created,
   195→      dateModified: data.modified || undefined,
   196→    }
   197→
   198→    return (
   199→      <TocHeadingStrategyProvider
   200→        contentFormat={data.contentFormat}
   201→        hasContent={!!data.content}
   202→      >
   203→        {currentPath !== fullPath && <SlugReplacer to={fullPath} />}
   204→        <LdJsonWithAuthor baseLdJson={jsonLd} />
   205→
   206→        <PageColorGradient seed={data.title + data.category.name} />
   207→        <CurrentPostDataProvider data={data} />
   208→        <PostDataReValidate fetchedAt={fetchedAt} />
   209→        <div
   210→          className="relative flex min-h-[120px] grid-cols-[auto_200px] lg:grid"
   211→          data-server-fetched-at={fetchedAt}
   212→        >
   213→          <BottomToUpTransitionView lcpOptimization className="min-w-0">
   214→            <RoomProvider roomName={buildRoomName(data.id)}>
   215→              <PostPage data={data} />
   216→            </RoomProvider>
   217→
   218→            <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView delay={500}>
   219→              <CommentAreaRootLazy
   220→                allowComment={data.allowComment}
   221→                refId={data.id}
   222→              />
   223→            </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
   224→          </BottomToUpTransitionView>
   225→
   226→          <LayoutRightSideProvider className="relative hidden lg:block" />
   227→        </div>
   228→
   229→        <OnlyMobile>
   230→          <TocFAB />
   231→        </OnlyMobile>
   232→      </TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
   233→    )
   234→  },
   235→})
   236→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/pageExtra.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { Image } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import { useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5→// --- PostNoticeCard: unified notice card for post detail ---
     6→import { differenceInDays } from 'date-fns'
     7→import { useLocale, useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     8→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     9→import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react'
    10→import type { BlogPosting, WithContext } from 'schema-dts'
    11→
    12→import { appStaticConfig } from '~/app.static.config'
    13→import { useFocusReading } from '~/atoms/hooks/reading'
    14→import { withClientOnly } from '~/components/common/ClientOnly'
    15→import { AIGenBadge } from '~/components/modules/ai/AIGenBadge'
    16→import { PeekLink } from '~/components/modules/peek/PeekLink'
    17→import { PostMetaBar } from '~/components/modules/post/PostMetaBar'
    18→import { CurrentReadingCountingMetaBarItem } from '~/components/modules/shared/MetaBar'
    19→import {
    20→  NoticeCard,
    21→  NoticeCardItem,
    22→  TranslationNoticeContent,
    23→} from '~/components/modules/shared/NoticeCard'
    24→import { SummarySwitcher } from '~/components/modules/shared/SummarySwitcher'
    25→import { WithArticleSelectionAction } from '~/components/modules/shared/WithArticleSelectionAction'
    26→import { TranslationLanguageSwitcher } from '~/components/modules/translation/TranslationLanguageSwitcher'
    27→import { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time'
    28→import { useRouter } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    29→import { logger } from '~/lib/logger'
    30→import { noopArr } from '~/lib/noop'
    31→import { MarkdownImageRecordProvider } from '~/providers/article/MarkdownImageRecordProvider'
    32→import {
    33→  useCurrentPostDataSelector,
    34→  useSetCurrentPostData,
    35→} from '~/providers/post/CurrentPostDataProvider'
    36→import { useAggregationSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'
    37→import type { PostWithTranslation } from '~/queries/definition'
    38→import { queries } from '~/queries/definition'
    39→
    40→export const LdJsonWithAuthor = ({
    41→  baseLdJson,
    42→}: {
    43→  baseLdJson: WithContext<BlogPosting>
    44→}) => {
    45→  const jsonLd = useAggregationSelector(
    46→    (state) =>
    47→      ({
    48→        ...baseLdJson,
    49→        author: {
    50→          '@type': 'Person',
    51→          name: state.user.name,
    52→          url: state.url.webUrl,
    53→        },
    54→      }) as WithContext<BlogPosting>,
    55→  )
    56→  return (
    57→    <script
    58→      type="application/ld+json"
    59→      dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
    60→        __html: JSON.stringify(jsonLd),
    61→      }}
    62→    />
    63→  )
    64→}
    65→export const PostTitle = () => {
    66→  const title = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.title)!
    67→
    68→  return (
    69→    <h1 className="mb-8 text-balance text-center text-4xl font-bold leading-tight">
    70→      {title}
    71→    </h1>
    72→  )
    73→}
    74→export const MarkdownSelection: Component = (props) => {
    75→  const id = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.id)!
    76→  const title = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.title)!
    77→  const allowComment = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.allowComment)!
    78→  const contentFormat = useCurrentPostDataSelector(
    79→    (data) => data?.contentFormat,
    80→  )
    81→  const content = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.content)
    82→  const translationLang = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) =>
    83→    data?.isTranslated ? data.translationMeta?.targetLang : null,
    84→  )
    85→  return (
    86→    <WithArticleSelectionAction
    87→      canComment={allowComment}
    88→      content={contentFormat === 'lexical' ? (content ?? undefined) : undefined}
    89→      contentFormat={contentFormat}
    90→      refId={id}
    91→      title={title}
    92→      translationLang={translationLang}
    93→    >
    94→      {props.children}
    95→    </WithArticleSelectionAction>
    96→  )
    97→}
    98→export const FocusReadingEffect = () => {
    99→  useFocusReading()
   100→  return null
   101→}
   102→
   103→export const PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider = (props: PropsWithChildren) => {
   104→  const images = useCurrentPostDataSelector(
   105→    (data) => data?.images || (noopArr as Image[]),
   106→  )
   107→
   108→  return (
   109→    <MarkdownImageRecordProvider images={images || noopArr}>
   110→      {props.children}
   111→    </MarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   112→  )
   113→}
   114→export const PostMetaBarInternal: Component = ({ className }) => {
   115→  const meta = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => {
   116→    if (!data) return
   117→    return {
   118→      created: data.created,
   119→      category: data.category,
   120→      tags: data.tags,
   121→      count: data.count,
   122→      modified: data.modified,
   123→      aiGen: data.meta?.aiGen,
   124→      availableTranslations: (data as any).availableTranslations as
   125→        | string[]
   126→        | undefined,
   127→      translationMeta: data.translationMeta,
   128→    }
   129→  })
   130→
   131→  if (!meta) return null
   132→  return (
   133→    <PostMetaBar className={className} meta={meta}>
   134→      <CurrentReadingCountingMetaBarItem />
   135→      <AIGenBadge value={meta.aiGen} />
   136→      <TranslationLanguageSwitcher
   137→        availableTranslations={meta.availableTranslations}
   138→        sourceLang={meta.translationMeta?.sourceLang}
   139→      />
   140→    </PostMetaBar>
   141→  )
   142→}
   143→
   144→export const PostDataReValidate: FC<{
   145→  fetchedAt: string
   146→}> = withClientOnly(({ fetchedAt }) => {
   147→  const isOutdated = useMemo(
   148→    () =>
   149→      Date.now() - new Date(fetchedAt).getTime() > appStaticConfig.revalidate,
   150→    [fetchedAt],
   151→  )
   152→  const dataSetter = useSetCurrentPostData()
   153→
   154→  const locale = useLocale()
   155→
   156→  const { category, slug } = useCurrentPostDataSelector((post) => {
   157→    if (!post) return {}
   158→    return {
   159→      category: post.category,
   160→      slug: post.slug,
   161→    }
   162→  })
   163→  const onceRef = useRef(false)
   164→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
   165→  useEffect(() => {
   166→    if (onceRef.current) return
   167→
   168→    onceRef.current = true
   169→    if (!isOutdated) return
   170→
   171→    if (!category || !slug) return
   172→
   173→    queryClient
   174→      .fetchQuery(queries.post.bySlug(category.slug, slug, locale))
   175→      .then((data) => {
   176→        dataSetter(data as PostWithTranslation)
   177→        // toast.info('此文章访问的内容已过期，所以页面数据自动更新了。')
   178→        logger.log('Post data revalidated', data)
   179→      })
   180→  }, [category, dataSetter, isOutdated, locale, queryClient, slug])
   181→  return null
   182→})
   183→
   184→export const SlugReplacer = ({ to }: { to: string }) => {
   185→  const router = useRouter()
   186→  const onceRef = useRef(false)
   187→
   188→  if (!onceRef.current) {
   189→    onceRef.current = true
   190→    router.replace(to)
   191→  }
   192→
   193→  return null
   194→}
   195→
   196→export const PostNoticeCard = () => {
   197→  const t = useTranslations('post')
   198→  const data = useCurrentPostDataSelector((s) => {
   199→    if (!s) return null
   200→    return {
   201→      id: s.id,
   202→      modified: s.modified,
   203→      isTranslated: s.isTranslated,
   204→      translationMeta: s.translationMeta,
   205→      summary: s.summary || '',
   206→      related: s.related,
   207→    }
   208→  })
   209→
   210→  if (!data) return null
   211→
   212→  const { id, modified, isTranslated, translationMeta, summary, related } = data
   213→  const isOutdated = modified
   214→    ? differenceInDays(new Date(), new Date(modified)) > 60
   215→    : false
   216→
   217→  return (
   218→    <NoticeCard className="my-8">
   219→      {isOutdated && modified && (
   220→        <NoticeCardItem>
   221→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-neutral-5">
   222→            <span className="opacity-90">
   223→              <i className="i-mingcute-warning-line text-base" />
   224→            </span>
   225→            <span>
   226→              {t('outdated_prefix')}
   227→              <RelativeTime date={modified} />
   228→              {t('outdated_suffix')}
   229→            </span>
   230→          </div>
   231→        </NoticeCardItem>
   232→      )}
   233→      {related && related.length > 0 && (
   234→        <NoticeCardItem>
   235→          <div
   236→            data-hide-print
   237→            className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-neutral-5"
   238→          >
   239→            <span className="opacity-90">
   240→              <i className="i-mingcute-link-2-line text-base" />
   241→            </span>
   242→            <span>{t('related_before')}</span>
   243→          </div>
   244→          <div className="mt-1.5 space-y-1.5 pl-[calc(1rem+8px)]">
   245→            {related.map((post) => {
   246→              const href = `/posts/${post.category.slug}/${post.slug}`
   247→              return (
   248→                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5" key={href}>
   249→                  <span className="text-neutral-4">
   250→                    <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-right-line text-sm" />
   251→                  </span>
   252→                  <PeekLink
   253→                    className="text-sm text-neutral-7 transition-colors hover:text-accent"
   254→                    href={href}
   255→                  >
   256→                    {post.title}
   257→                  </PeekLink>
   258→                </div>
   259→              )
   260→            })}
   261→          </div>
   262→        </NoticeCardItem>
   263→      )}
   264→      {isTranslated && translationMeta && (
   265→        <NoticeCardItem>
   266→          <TranslationNoticeContent translationMeta={translationMeta} />
   267→        </NoticeCardItem>
   268→      )}
   269→      <NoticeCardItem variant="summary">
   270→        <SummarySwitcher articleId={id!} summary={summary} variant="inline" />
   271→      </NoticeCardItem>
   272→    </NoticeCard>
   273→  )
   274→}
   275→
```
</details></tool-use>
